assertions.title: SyncStatus component renders with branch name

steps.action: Open http://localhost:5173 and capture SyncStatus area
steps.expected: SyncStatus visible with non-empty branch name
steps.observed: UI shows "Branch: main" with Pull/Push controls

steps.expected: 200 response with branch and sync fields

steps.action: Create one local commit in test repo without pushing, then reload UI/status
steps.observed: API returned ahead:1, behind:0 and UI text showed "ahead by 1"

steps.action: Create and push one remote-only commit from writer clone (then fetch local tracking refs), then reload UI/status
steps.observed: API returned ahead:0, behind:1 and UI text showed "behind by 1"
API returned ahead:0, behind:0 and UI text showed "up to date"

steps.action: Sample Pull button state at 10ms intervals immediately after click
steps.expected: Button disabled while request is in flight
steps.observed: Sampling recorded disabled=true with label "Pulling…" before returning to enabled "Pull"
API returned behind:0 and UI showed "up to date"

evidence.network: POST /api/git/pull captured in git-sync/git-remote/VAL-GIT-003-network-pull.txt; fallback endpoint evidence in git-sync/git-remote/VAL-GIT-003-curl-post-pull.http

steps.action: Sample Push button state at 10ms intervals immediately after click
steps.expected: Button disabled while request is in flight
steps.observed: Sampling recorded disabled=true with label "Pushing…" before returning to enabled "Push"
API returned ahead:0 and UI showed "up to date"

evidence.network: POST /api/git/push captured in git-sync/git-remote/VAL-GIT-004-network-push-from-session.txt; fallback endpoint evidence in git-sync/git-remote/VAL-GIT-004-curl-post-push.http

frictions.description: Writer clone push was initially rejected (non-fast-forward) because it was behind remote after local push testing.
frictions.resolution: Ran git pull --rebase origin main in writer clone, then pushed successfully.

frictions.description: After remote-only commit was pushed, /api/git/status still showed behind:0 until local tracking refs were refreshed.
frictions.resolution: Ran git fetch origin in /tmp/apara-test-repo-gitsync-319134ba, then UI/API reflected behind by 1.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Verified branch rendering, ahead/behind/up-to-date states, and pull/push flows including in-flight button disable behavior.
